title: landukia heterophylla
intro: Landukia heterophylla, also known as the Indian cactus or star cactus, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Landukia heterophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, allowing for various applications in treating different health conditions.
